headline: Paramount Skydance price target lowered as analysts flag Warner Bros. Discovery acquisition risks
summary: Bank of America analysts have lowered their price target on Paramount Skydance Corp (NASDAQ:PSKY) while reiterating an ‘Underperform’ rating, pointing to near-term uncertainty surrounding the company’s planned acquisition of Warner Bros. headline: YouTube surpasses Disney, Paramount, WBD in 2025 ad revenue
summary: YouTube pulled in $40.4 billion in ad revenue last year, which is more than Disney, NBC, Paramount, and Warner Bros. Discovery combined.

raw.headline: YouTube surpasses Disney, Paramount, WBD in 2025 ad revenue

headline: Paramount Skydance’s Stock Fades. The Warner Bros. Merger Will Take Years to Pay Off, BofA Says.
summary: BofA reiterates an Underperform rating on Paramount stock after the company’s deal to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery.

headline: 1 Large-Cap Stock with Exciting Potential and 2 We Turn Down
summary: Large-cap stocks are known for their staying power and ability to weather market storms better than smaller competitors. However, their sheer size makes it more challenging to maintain high growth rates as they’ve already captured significant portions of their markets.

raw.headline: 1 Large-Cap Stock with Exciting Potential and 2 We Turn Down

headline: Option traders moderately bearish in Warner Bros. Discovery with shares down 0.55%
summary: Option traders moderately bearish in Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD), with shares down 16c near $27.80. Options volume relatively light with 3639 contracts traded and calls leading puts for a put/call ratio of 0.66, compared to a typical level near 3.14. Implied volatility (IV30) is higher by 0.3 points near 10.53,in the lowest 10% of observations over the past year, suggesting an expected daily move of $0.18. Put-call skew steepened, indicating increased demand for downside protection.Claim 70% Of
